According to Wikidata, The Beatles sold the most records. The query shows that The Beatles (wd:Q1299) has a higher total sales value (P5707) compared to Elvis Presley (wd:Q303).

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?artist WHERE {
  VALUES ?artist {
    wd:Q303 wd:Q1299
  }
  ?artist wdt:P5707 ?sales
}
ORDER BY DESC(?sales)
LIMIT 1
```
